title: Toybox
description: Adds a toy/soft-play/party themed dimension, with many places to explore and a boss to fight
body:
Toybox adds a strange toy/soft-play/party themed dimension, with many places to explore and a clown boss to fight, there is a minigame, dice, trampolines and all sorts of toys... not all are friendly though. The mod has an in-game guide book so no need for a wiki.

![Toybox thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4cbeb0dc7f76c4805af9a281bf8d1d91e2c7727.png)

This mod has numerous inspirations, such as the scrapped Playtopia dimension from Advent of Ascension, climbing walls I've been to, soft-plays and various toys

This mod currently has no known incompatibilities or bugs, but if you find any do let me know.

Requires Geckolib
